scripts.dev:hmr: concurrently -k -n web,desktop -c cyan,magenta "bun run hmr" "electrobun dev --watch"
scripts.build: turbo run build -F web && electrobun build
scripts.build:stable: turbo run build -F web && electrobun build --env=stable
scripts.build:canary: turbo run build -F web && electrobun build --env=canary
